Bullet Point 1: Individual candy drops flavored with natural anise seed, now available in 8.8oz bulk sachet.
Bullet Point 2: All natural
Bullet Point 3: Made in France
Product Description: This candy, consisting of a grain of aniseed coated in sugar was manufactured in the 17th Century by Ursuline sisters. Six months were needed to add and dry the successive coats of sugar. Today, the factory is still situated at the heart of the ancient abbey, but the process is completed in only 15 days.

The 8.8 oz bulk packaging suggests value for gourmet or specialty retailers, while the natural anise flavor and artisanal production enhance its premium appeal. The packaging and branding indicate a high-end product justified by its traditional manufacturing process and unique origin.
